W

WaitlistAdapter - Class in com.example.edgers_lottery
RecyclerView adapter that displays a list of waitlisted users.
WaitlistAdapter(List<WaitlistUser>, WaitlistAdapter.OnRemoveClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.edgers_lottery.WaitlistAdapter
Constructs a new adapter for the given waitlist.
WaitlistAdapter.OnRemoveClickListener - Interface in com.example.edgers_lottery
Listener interface for handling removal of a waitlisted user.
WaitlistAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.edgers_lottery
ViewHolder that holds references to the profile image, name, and remove button for a single waitlist row.
WaitlistUser - Class in com.example.edgers_lottery
Model class representing a user entry on an event's waitlist.
WaitlistUser(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.edgers_lottery.WaitlistUser
Constructs a new WaitlistUser with all required fields.
